message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceParticipant underline false
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

participant ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer
participant LifecycleDispatcher
participant DispatcherActivityCallback
participant FragmentCallback
participant ReportFragment

ProcessLifecycleOwnerInitializer -> LifecycleDispatcher : onCreate()
LifecycleDispatcher -> DispatcherActivityCallback : static init()
DispatcherActivityCallback -> FragmentCallback : onActivityCreated
DispatcherActivityCallback -> ReportFragment : onActivityCreated

@enduml
